prompt.goal: Tutor apply job Open: CoverNote ≤500, ProposedRate optional; Status Pending; 1 lần/job; cần TutorProfile IsVerified.
prompt.scope: - ApplicationController Apply GET/POST [Authorize Tutor] - Validate job Open, chưa apply, profile verified - View Apply.cshtml
prompt.hardRules: - KHÔNG Accept/Reject (T3) - KHÔNG apply job Closed - AntiForgery POST
prompt.acceptanceCriteria: - [ ] Apply OK → DB Pending - [ ] Apply 2 lần → lỗi - [ ] Chưa verified → chặn - [ ] build pass
prompt.testPlan: 1. Tutor verified → Apply job Open 2. Apply lại → reject 3. Student không vào Apply
